en_title: PlayStation 5 Now Features Custom GTA 6 UI, as Sony Goes All In on Rockstar Partnership
cn_title: 《PlayStation》PS5推出《GTA6》定制界面，索尼全面押注Rockstar合作
subtitle: 满屏棕榈叶
opus_summary: 索尼与Rockstar合作升级，PS5加入《GTA6》定制动画界面和预购入口。索尼推广中曾删帖换图以适应数字版，并宣传PS5体验最佳。游戏11月19日发售。

paragraphs.en: Load up your PlayStation 5 today, and you'll be greeted by a new custom user interface advertising Grand Theft Auto 6 — part of Sony's major new partnership with Rockstar Games.
paragraphs.cn: 今天打开你的PS5，就会看到一个全新的自定义用户界面，上面宣传着《侠盗猎车手6》（GTA6）——这是索尼与Rockstar Games重大新合作的一部分。

paragraphs.en: The PS5's Welcome section now includes a flashy animated version of the GTA 6 logo, which zooms in and reveals a splash screen with details on the game, as well as a button to go view its store page (and pre-order).
paragraphs.cn: PS5的「欢迎」版块现在包含一个炫酷的《GTA6》动态logo，它会放大并展现一个闪屏，上面有游戏详情，还有一个按钮可以前往商店页面（并预购）。

paragraphs.en: Of course, Sony has rolled out this update following GTA 6 pre-orders officially going live at midnight last night, as well as the start of its own marketing campaign for the game, which it has boasted "plays best on PS5."
paragraphs.cn: 当然，索尼是在昨夜午夜《GTA6》预购正式开启、以及索尼自己针对这款游戏的营销活动启动之际，推出了此次更新。索尼曾宣称《GTA6》「在PS5上表现最佳」。

paragraphs.en: Yesterday, Sony published a blog post championing the features of its console that GTA 6 will use , including the speaker in the DualSense controller and the pad's haptic feedback.
paragraphs.cn: 昨天，索尼发布了一篇博客文章，宣扬其主机将支持《GTA6》的哪些功能，包括DualSense手柄的扬声器和触觉反馈。

paragraphs.en: Rather amusingly, Sony later deleted and reposted a series of posts on social media linking to this blog post that featured an image of the PS5's disc-based edition. The social posts were later replaced with versions that featured the PS5's digital-only console — more fitting with the fact that GTA 6 will not have a disc .
paragraphs.cn: 颇为有趣的是，索尼随后删除并重新发布了一系列社交媒体帖子，这些帖子链接到这篇博客文章，并展示了一张PS5光盘版主机的图片。这些社交帖子后来被替换为展示PS5数字版主机的版本——这更符合《GTA6》将没有实体光盘的事实。

paragraphs.en: Grand Theft Auto VI launches November 19, with pre-orders starting June 25.
paragraphs.cn: 《侠盗猎车手6》将于11月19日发售，预购于6月25日开启。

paragraphs.en: Learn why it plays best on PS5: https://t.co/w0enIHvPFQ pic.twitter.com/ekpnz2Tfz2
paragraphs.cn: 了解为什么它在PS5上体验最佳：https://t.co/w0enIHvPFQ pic.twitter.com/ekpnz2Tfz2

paragraphs.en: Other additions to GTA 6's PlayStation 5 marketing campaign include a newly-themed version of the PlayStation app logo on smartphones, that features GTA 6 colors and pale tree fronds.
paragraphs.cn: 《GTA6》在PS5营销活动中的其他新增内容还包括智能手机上PlayStation应用Logo的全新主题版本，采用了《GTA6》的配色和浅色树叶图案。

paragraphs.en: Sony has started updating its logos like the PlayStation App with GTA 6 branding #PS5 #GTA6 #GrandTheftAutoVI pic.twitter.com/dNknjOvw7P
paragraphs.cn: 索尼已开始将PlayStation应用等Logo更新为《GTA6》品牌形象 #PS5 #GTA6 #GrandTheftAutoVI pic.twitter.com/dNknjOvw7P

paragraphs.en: Sony itself has previously stated that the launch of GTA 6 is the best reason yet for PlayStation fans still using a PS4 to finally upgrade their console, as GTA 6 will only be available on PS5 (and Xbox Series X/S). Rockstar also recently eased the console transition itself, by promising free upgrades to GTA 5 on PS5 and Xbox Series X/S for those with a PS4 or Xbox One copy .
paragraphs.cn: 索尼此前曾表示，对于仍在使用PS4的PlayStation粉丝来说，《侠盗猎车手6》的发布是他们最终升级主机的绝佳理由，因为《侠盗猎车手6》将仅在PS5（和XBOX Series）上推出。Rockstar最近也降低了主机过渡的门槛，承诺为拥有PS4或XBOX One版《侠盗猎车手5》的玩家免费升级到PS5和XBOX Series版。

paragraphs.en: Need to catch up on all of the GTA 6 news? Rockstar has now announced GTA 6's price and also a pricier $100 Ultimate Edition , released 63 new GTA 6 screenshots , and confirmed that physical editions of the game won't include a disc in the box .
paragraphs.cn: 需要了解所有《GTA6》消息吗？Rockstar现已公布了《GTA6》的售价，还推出了更昂贵的100美元(约合人民币681元)终极版，发布了63张全新的《GTA6》截图，并确认游戏的实体版包装盒内将不再附带光盘。

paragraphs.en: Tom Phillips is IGN's News Editor. You can reach Tom at tom_phillips@ign.com or find him on Bluesky
paragraphs.cn: Tom Phillips是IGN的新闻编辑。你可以通过tom_phillips@ign.com联系Tom，或在Bluesky上找到他。
